about: Sohigh Solar — 20+ years in PV (since 2005), Grade-A LiFePO₄ cells, pure sine-wave hybrid inverters. Certified ISO9001 / ISO14001 / ISO45001, IEC61215 / IEC61730, CE, SGS, TÜV.
